effect_entries.effect: Quand le Pokémon entre au combat, il absorbe l'énergie autour de lui et se transforme en sa Forme Téracristal.
effect_entries.short_effect: Quand Terapagos entre au combat, il se change en sa Forme Téracristal jusqu’à la fin du combat.

effect_entries.effect: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it absorbs the energy around itself and transforms into its Terastal Form.
effect_entries.short_effect: When Terapagos enters the battle, it turns into its Terastal Form until the end of the battle.
